# Manifest of cmake-xray HTML report goldens (AP M5-1.4).
#
# Each non-comment, non-blank line names exactly one .html golden file in
# this directory. Tranche A creates this manifest empty; Tranche C adds the
# analyze and impact goldens that lock the HTML contract in place. Per-
# platform variants (*_windows.html) cover host-divergent path semantics:
#
#   - impact_absolute_windows.html   -> Windows treats C:/project/... as
#                                       absolute; POSIX treats it as relative.
#                                       The Windows golden is hand-derived
#                                       from its POSIX twin via path
#                                       substitution (Sub-Risiko C.1, plan
#                                       section 698).
#   - analyze_escaping_windows.html  -> Windows path resolver normalises
#                                       backslash to forward slash before
#                                       the HTML adapter sees it; POSIX keeps
#                                       backslash as part of the filename.
#
# tests/e2e/run_e2e.sh selects the right variant via case "$(uname -s)".
# Any divergence beyond the documented path-separator/path-prefix substitutions
# indicates an HTML-adapter or path-resolver bug, not a fixture issue.
#
# Coverage of the eight Tranche-C-listed analyze cases (plan ~673-681):
#   1 Compile-DB-only            -> analyze_compile_db_only.html
#   2 File-API-only with targets -> analyze_file_api_only.html
#   3 Mixed-Input                -> analyze_mixed_input.html
#   4 default --top              -> analyze_default_top.html (no flag, 3
#                                   leersaetze: no hotspots, no target
#                                   metadata, no diagnostics)
#   5 --top untruncated          -> analyze_top_untruncated.html
#   6 --top ranking+hotspot trun.-> analyze_top_truncated.html
#   7 hotspot-context truncation -> analyze_hotspot_context_truncated.html
#   8 leeres Ergebnis mit        -> spans analyze_default_top.html (3
#     Leersaetzen                   leersaetze) + analyze_directory_contexts
#                                   .html (same-source-path contract plus
#                                   "No include hotspots" leersatz). No
#                                   single golden covers "No translation
#                                   units to report." because a valid
#                                   compile_commands.json must hold at
#                                   least one entry.
#   + escaping golden            -> analyze_escaping.html (covers <, >, &,
#                                   ", ', backslash, newline,
#                                   <script>-strings per plan ~691)

# Analyze goldens
analyze_compile_db_only.html
analyze_file_api_only.html
analyze_mixed_input.html
analyze_default_top.html
analyze_top_untruncated.html
analyze_top_truncated.html
analyze_hotspot_context_truncated.html
analyze_directory_contexts.html
analyze_escaping.html
analyze_escaping_windows.html

# Impact goldens
impact_compile_db_relative.html
impact_file_api_relative.html
impact_mixed_input.html
impact_direct_targets.html
impact_no_affected_targets.html
impact_absolute.html
impact_absolute_windows.html
